visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long reddish-brown hair and bright red lipstick occupies the center frame in a close-up shot. She wears a gray t-shirt with a Hollyland lavalier microphone attached to the collar. She smiles warmly and speaks directly to the camera. The background shows blurred windows of a modern building under bright daylight. (2) The camera zooms out and pans slightly to reveal two young women standing behind the main subject on an outdoor terrace. One has black hair with bangs, and the other has dark hair tied in pigtails. Both hold rectangular snack boxes—one red and one yellow. They smile and look at the camera against a backdrop of a glass-paneled building. (3) The scene shifts to show two different young women standing behind the main subject. One has blonde hair and the other has dark hair. They are holding bright green snack bags featuring a cartoon character. They smile and pose cheerfully. The setting remains the same outdoor patio with chairs and a decorative birdcage-like structure in the distance. (4) The main subject waves her hand toward the camera while the other four women in the background also wave and smile. The group appears energetic and coordinated. The camera remains handheld with slight movement, maintaining a high-energy social-media-style production vibe with natural bright colors.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: HOLLYLAND. (2) [Slogan]: 義美小泡芙. (3) [Slogan]: 乖乖.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in front, 4 other women appearing in groups behind her.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The woman has long reddish-brown hair, wearing a gray t-shirt and a Hollyland lavalier microphone.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An outdoor rooftop or balcony terrace with glass windows of a modern building, outdoor patio furniture, and a decorative wicker structure.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-tempo, energetic pop music featuring a heavy electronic beat and synthesized bass. Male and female vocals chant 'Rock your body' rhythmically. The music is bright and polished with high spectral density. (2) A female voice with a clear, professional, and excited tone speaks in Mandarin over the music. The speech rate is fast, with an enthusiastic pitch contour. The music continues at the same volume level, creating a balanced mix. (3) Brief background vocalizations and cheers from other females are heard, coinciding with the visual reveal of the group. The music remains the dominant structural element, maintaining a high-energy dance atmosphere with a consistent 128 BPM tempo until the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Showcase -> Group Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote Taiwanese snack brands by associating them with a trendy, youthful, and high-energy social lifestyle. The combination of professional audio equipment and upbeat pop music suggests a targeted social media marketing objective.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The subjects are holding and displaying specific snack packages (I-Mei Puffs and Kuai Kuai) clearly towards the camera while smiling and posing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal audio-visual combination to create an appealing endorsement for consumer goods.
